findings.title: TLS certificate verification disabled for Supabase PostgreSQL connection
findings.detail: pg-client.ts:47 set `rejectUnauthorized: false` for Supabase connections, disabling TLS certificate validation. An attacker performing DNS poisoning could intercept all knowledge-graph database traffic. Fixed: changed ssl option to `true` (uses system trust store with full verification). Supabase certs are CA-signed so verification passes cleanly.

findings.title: Opus model version claude-opus-4-7 outdated in routing config
findings.detail: config/routing.json referenced claude-opus-4-7 but current latest Opus is claude-opus-4-8. All opus-tier routes (security/auth/migration/critical tasks) would fail API calls if 4-7 is deprecated. Fixed: updated all references in routing.json to claude-opus-4-8.

findings.title: Opus model version claude-opus-4-7 outdated in classifier fallback tiers
findings.detail: src/classifier/index.ts FALLBACK_TIERS hardcoded claude-opus-4-7 as the opus tier fallback. Fixed: updated to claude-opus-4-8 and aligned 32 references in classifier test file.
findings.fix_sketch: Change opus: 'claude-opus-4-7' to opus: 'claude-opus-4-8' in FALLBACK_TIERS; bulk-replace in tests.

findings.title: HIGH_KEYWORDS substring matching routes noncritical tasks to Opus architect
findings.detail: scoreKeywords() and hasHighKeyword used text.includes(kw) causing false positives: 'noncritical' matched 'critical' (score +3 → opus tier), 'author' matched 'auth'. Fixed: introduced HIGH_KEYWORD_RE array with word-boundary regex patterns. 'critical' uses full word boundaries; 'auth' uses prefix-boundary with negative lookahead to exclude 'author' while still matching 'authentication'/'authorization'. Both scoreKeywords() and hasHighKeyword updated.
findings.fix_sketch: Add HIGH_KEYWORD_RE = HIGH_KEYWORDS.map(kw => kw==='critical' ? /\bcritical\b/ : kw==='auth' ? /\bauth(?!or\b)/ : new RegExp('\\b'+kw)). Use in scoreKeywords and hasHighKeyword.

findings.title: Unused defaultModel field in routing.json
findings.detail: config/routing.json declared `defaultModel: 'sonnet-4.6'` but no TypeScript code reads this field (RoutingConfig interface omits it). Misleads future readers. Fixed: removed the unused field.
findings.fix_sketch: Remove the defaultModel line from routing.json.

findings.title: CLAUDE.md references M4.6/M4.7/M4.8 as pending after ADR-0004 marked them resolved
findings.detail: CLAUDE.md warned that mode:* override, category:*, and severity:* label paths were not yet canonical-aligned, but ADR-0004 marks M4.6/M4.7/M4.8 as resolved in PR #301/#304 (2026-06-03). Fixed: updated the routing paragraph to reflect full alignment.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace the 'not yet complete' paragraph with a statement that M4.6/M4.7/M4.8 were resolved in PR #301 and #304.
